name: Jeb Bush
subject: The perfect gift for my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend -

I say it all the time: I have the best parents in the world.

To this day, whenever I start tooting my own horn, I instantly feel the looming presence of my mother behind my back, keeping me humble and telling me, "Don't brag, it's not about you."

It's been that way for the better part of a century. Mom's pushed me to be a better man, cheered me on, and picked me up; there hasn't been a moment along the way when she wasn't there for me.

She's given so much to her family, and to this country, but today, I want to give her a little something back.

As you know, Mother's Day is this Sunday and I know it would make her day to get a card signed by all our supporters.

[**So please, join me in wishing her a Happy Mother 's Day by signing her card.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3092:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

I know she would love to hear from all of you on this special day, so please sign her card now: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/Happy-Mothers-Day/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3093:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Thank you, and Happy Mother's day to the moms in your life.

Jeb

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3094:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=380&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

It's been that way for the better part of a century. Mom's pushed me to be a better man, cheered me on, and picked me up; there hasn't been a moment along the way when she wasn't there for me. She's given so much to her family, and to this country, but today, I want to give her a little something back. As you know, Mother's Day is this Sunday and I know it would make her day to get a card signed by all our supporters. name: Team Marco
subject: This week's picks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956396:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r)
---
Peter, _**[Have you visited MarcoRubio.com lately?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956396:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r)**_** ** If you haven't, you're missing out on tons of news and critical action items. Here's a look at this week's most popular stories on our website: **Most Popular on Facebook** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956397:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) **Shared 2,824 times on Facebook** Watch the full interview with CBN News' David Brody [on our website here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956398:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) **Our Pick** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956399:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) We grew our team with two new leaders in the key early states of Iowa and Nevada this week. [Click here to learn more](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956400:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) about why State Senator Jack Whitver is leading Marco's efforts in Iowa. [Then click here to learn](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956399:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) why Lieutenant Governor Mark Hutchison, our Nevada campaign chairman, is under pressure. **This Week 's Top Petition** **[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956401:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r)** More than 1,310 people have signed our petition calling on Congress to stand up to Iran and oppose any deal that makes it easier for Iran to develop nuclear weapons. [Click here to sign and add your name.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956401:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) **Trending on Twitter** Across the country,grassroots supporters are launching their own Team Marco Twitter accounts & Facebook pages. [_**Click here to see our (ever-growing) list of unofficial, supporter-run groups.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956402:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) And remember, if you don't see your state, why not start it yourself? **Viral Video** New Hampshire, as home of the first presidential primary, plays a critical role in our campaign. [_**Watch highlights from Marco 's first trip to the Granite State as a candidate here and help send him there on future trips.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956403:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956403:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r) And that's this week's roundup of the very best from _**[MarcoRubio.com.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41956404:16953629373:m:1:1349778030:D96DB42BF747075E3F435B07FD45976F:r)**_ -Team Marco

name: stop-rick-scott@murphyforflorida.com
subject: SIGN to STOP Rick Scott ✋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The Florida legislature passed a bill that would require a 24-hour waiting period for abortions. _**LAST WEEK: **_ **Patrick alerted you that extreme Florida Republicans passed an anti-choice bill that severely restricts women 's access to healthcare.** **He asked for your help demanding Rick Scott veto this anti-choice bill immediately.** [](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae279a/738133e4/39a228d1/7f9baa8e/512710749/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/veto?sc=ema_2015-05-08_b1_tm_ldnd") **What happened next?** **You. Stepped! UP!!!** **Over 5,000 concerned citizens have signed the petition. That 's incredible!** **Now let 's hit 10,000 petition signers demanding Rick Scott veto this anti-choice bill.** **[Click here to join Patrick in demanding Rick Scott veto this bill immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae279a/738133e4/39a228d1/7f9baa8e/512710749/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/veto?sc=ema_2015-05-08_b1_tm_ldnd")** | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida.
